clinical_blockers: Neer, Hawkins-Kennedy, drop-arm, apprehension, Jobe, lift-off, and other individual test accuracy are not established by the reviewed sections.
UAE imaging/referral pathways, antibiotics, injections, analgesia, heat/ice, and fixed follow-up remain unsupported.
The rotator-cuff-injury diagnosis label remains clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
